Welcome to RACA

Home of the United States of Mars 3D Metaverse, Popular blockchain game Metamon World, NFT Marketplaces, and more.

Connect Manually

USM.WORLD
Global Celebrity Campaign
Sơn Tùng M-TP

The USM Metaverse

RACA's USM Metaverse is comprised of many regions called "states". Each state is rich in its characteristics, waiting to be explored. Enjoy concerts, galleries, and games in a way that you truly desire. Join and start building a better world. Together, on Mars!

NFT Marketplace

Purchase or sell USM Metaverse land, Metamon, and other RACA branded NFTs assets in our marketplace. Over $1 billion worth of NFTs were traded since inception.

About RACA

Launched in May 2021, RACA is a community driven decentralized 
autonomous organization (DAO). Boasting a large and experienced 
development team, hundreds of community volunteers, and a vast fanbase, 
RACA has become a leading Web 3.0 solutions provider. We are a 
people's DAO that has been with our community from the very start.

Community News

Stay Tuned, Exciting Developments Ahead in the RACA Ecosystem

RACA, a leader in the cryptocurrency and metaverse ecosystem, is thrilled to announce a series of exciting developments planned for the first quarter of 2024. With a steadfast commitment to innovation and advancement, RACA is gearing up for a series of announcements that promise to transform the user experience within the ecosystem. One of the most anticipated revelations involves USM, where fans from all corners of the metaverse can gather to witness the excitement of the integration between the physical and digital worlds. Whether football enthusiasts following EURO2024, aficionados of AFCON, or those immersed in the realms of Web3 and Metaverse, RACA promises a unique and thrilling experience. Furthermore, RACA has special surprises in store for the RACA token concerning liquidity and trading opportunities. The team is dedicated to providing RACA holders with new ways to interact with the token, further boosting its liquidity and creating advantageous trading opportunities. Stay tuned on our social media channels. We are excited to share these thrilling updates, representing a significant step towards our commitment to delivering an increasingly enhanced experience for our users. Supported by DWF Labs, OKX Blockdream Ventures, and the Tachyon accelerator by Consensys Mesh, RACA serves as a web 3.0 […]

Jan

27

RACA Searches Skyrocket 400% in 2024, Reflecting Growing Community Interest

The year 2024 witnessed a significant surge in searches related to the cryptocurrency RACA, underscoring a burgeoning interest and curiosity within the community regarding the project’s developments in the cryptocurrency segment. Data provided by Google Trends reveals that searches for the term “RACA” experienced an impressive increase of over 400%. A more in-depth analysis points to a specific interest in the Coingecko platform, where users seek detailed data on RACA’s performance and prices. Searches for the term “RACA Coingecko” recorded a notable growth of 200%, indicating a growing appetite for detailed information about the cryptocurrency on one of the leading price aggregators. Countries leading searches for the term “RACA” in January were Brazil, Portugal, and Turkey, highlighting a global reach in interest for the cryptocurrency. This phenomenon is substantiated by the sudden increase in searches related to “digital currency,” indicating an active quest for information in the broader context of the cryptocurrency universe. In addition to online search recognition, RACA also stood out as one of the Most Mentioned Cryptocurrencies on BNBChain, reinforcing its impact in the BNBChain ecosystem. The interest reflected in Google Trends is also mirrored in social media metrics, where RACA was chosen as one of the […]

Jan

26

RACA: Paving the Way for Web3 Development

A new report from Webisoft has highlighted the potential of Web3 and how this emerging technology is poised to revolutionize society’s interaction with the digital environment, creating new possibilities for bridging the gap between the physical and digital worlds and empowering individuals to truly own their identities, data, and digital interactions. RACA firmly believes in the premise outlined in the Webisoft report, asserting that Web3 is not just a buzzword; it is a growing universe. With innovative decentralized applications reshaping societal relationships, RACA is at the forefront of embracing the transformative power of Web3. According to Webisoft, current developments in Web3, akin to those underway at RACA, are laying the groundwork for profound changes in how we perceive and interact online, from the NFT boom to the emergence of metaverses. “As Web3 layers evolve, the focus often shifts to the new, overshadowing the fundamental aspects. As we navigate the evolving ‘state of the web3,’ we must embrace its possibilities and challenges, ensuring an inclusive, autonomous, and enriched Internet experience,” highlights the Webisoft report. RACA is deeply embedded in this evolving context, actively creating, developing, and contributing to the transformation of reality. The organization is investing in disruptive tools to expand […]

Jan

24

RACA is the Most Traded Metaverse Project on BNB Chain

The native token of the USM ecosystem, RACA, has achieved a remarkable feat by being recognized as the most traded metaverse project, according to data from CoinMarketCap compiled by Crypto Insights. Recording an exciting trading volume of $4.96 million, the RACA token surpassed all other metaverse projects on the BNB Chain and also ranked among the most traded metaverse projects across all blockchains. This recognition reaffirms RACA’s position as a dynamic force in the metaverse landscape, where innovation and engagement continue to drive its success. RACA’s performance didn’t stop there; it also stood out as one of the most traded projects in the last 7 days on the BNB Chain. According to data from CoinGecko, compiled by BSC Daily, RACA recorded over $52 million in trading in the past 7 days alone. This acknowledgment highlights not only the attractiveness of RACA to investors but also its consistent activity and interest in the thriving ecosystem of the BNB Chain. Supported by DWF Labs, OKX Blockdream Ventures, and the Tachyon accelerator by Consensys Mesh, RACA serves as a web 3.0 infrastructure solution provider. Initially launched as a bidding token with the Maye Musk NFT, RACA has evolved into a robust web3.0 gaming […]

Jan

21

RACA is at the forefront and already adopts trends for blockchain, web3 and metaverse in 2024￼

The renowned author of the best-seller “The STO Financial Revolution” and co-founder of Blockchain@UCLA Lab, Alex Nascimento, has shared his fascinating predictions for the crypto and Web3 landscape in 2024. According to his forecasts, RACA is already at the forefront of technology by adopting and implementing the trends outlined by the expert.* 1. Exponential Evolution in Web3 User Experience: Nascimento predicts a revolution in the Web3 user experience, with significant improvements in autonomous key and password management, wallet integration with decentralized applications, and signed transactions across various networks. RACA has been expanding its development in this sector, aiming to facilitate the management of users’ digital assets through partnerships, such as with OKX Wallet, Bitget Wallet, and others. 2. Fusion of Artificial Intelligence and Blockchains: The convergence of artificial intelligence and blockchains is seen as an innovative way to decentralize this technology, allowing individuals to contribute resources. RACA has also been working along these lines by forming partnerships with AI projects to enhance the DeFi ecosystem. 3. Collaborative Web3 Games: Web3 is redefining the gaming industry by introducing decentralized revenue models, much like RACA has done throughout its history with different games and the USM metaverse. 4. NFTs in Major Brands’ […]

Jan

20

RACA is elected as one of the most promising cryptocurrencies for 2024

The native token of the USM ecosystem, RACA, is pleased to announce that it has been elected as one of the most promising cryptocurrencies for 2024, according to a list compiled by BSCDaily. BSCDaily is one of the leading publications related to the BNB Chain and has recognized RACA as one of the most promising cryptocurrencies for 2024 in the gaming sector, due to RACA’s significant contributions and prominent role in the growing landscape of blockchain games, the metaverse, and Web3. Furthermore, BSC Daily highlights that the number of active users and transactions on the BNB Chain has significantly increased, thanks to innovative artificial intelligence (AI) and gaming projects, such as RACA. RACA consistently appears on the list of projects with the highest engagement on the BNB Chain and is among the top projects traded by BNB Chain traders. Supported by DWF Labs, OKX Blockdream Ventures, and the Tachyon accelerator by Consensys Mesh, RACA serves as a web 3.0 infrastructure solution provider. Initially launched as a bidding token with the Maye Musk NFT, RACA has evolved into a robust web3.0 gaming ecosystem! RACA, the USM native token, serves as a Crypto ‘dApp Store’ of AI Apps and Games, initiated by […]

Jan

19

Pump: Metaverse set to revive its potential in 2024, analysis suggests

2024 has already begun, and with the new year, the USM ecosystem, RACA, has announced various innovations, achievements, and implementations aimed at expanding the potential of Web3 and the metaverse. In light of these new possibilities, analysts at Aarin have pointed out that the metaverse is expected to revive its full potential in 2024. As RACA believes, the digital universe is poised to expand even further this year, attracting new users and the attention of major companies, helping to shape a new interconnected society. According to the company, among the trends for 2024, there are three major highlights: the metaverse, artificial intelligence, and 5G. Metaverse It seems that another technology gaining prominence is the metaverse, an evolution of virtual realities that promises to redefine business interactions. This year, significant expansion of this technology is expected, enabling financial transactions based on digital assets, such as NFTs (non-fungible tokens). Additionally, digital currencies are already integrated into the metaverse, indicating a new paradigm for online investments and financial experiences. Artificial Intelligence Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been present in the financial sector since the 1980s but is expected to gain more prominence in 2024. Autonomous and intelligent systems are being employed to enhance the […]

Jan

18

Unstoppable growth: RACA are Most traded Highlight Metaverse Projects

In 2024, the USM (RACA) ecosystem announced several partnerships and news, being the only blockchain protocol in the entire crypto market to announce an exclusive airdrop of Tesla cybertruck vehicles. In addition, partnerships were signed with Blockchain Uniport from University of Port Harcourt, (Nigeria), Blockchain UNIJOS, one of the largest crypto communities in Africa, and and DeFi, and Bitcoin protocols like B2 Network and Friend3. These and several other announcements are exciting RACA traders, which will help place the token among the largest BNB Chain assets traded in the crypto market. Data from the Crypto Insights portal, based on publications on X, highlights that this movement made RACA one of the most Bullish Cryptocurrencies on BNB Chain. The portal, which brings together data focused on the cryptocurrency market, also pointed out that the movement of whales, traders and the RACA community made the asset one of the most Mentioned Highlight Cryptocurrencies on BNB Chain Furthermore, data from Coingecko, one of the largest data portals on the digital asset market, pointed out that the growth of RACA made the asset one of the Top Gainers in BNB Chain Ecosystem. Data from Coinmarketcap also highlights RACA’s growth. According to the website, RACA […]

Jan

16

USM (RACA) announces a major partnership with the open-source social dApp, Friend3

The USM.world ecosystem (native token RACA) is delighted to announce a partnership with Friend3, a leading social dApp where anyone can make friends and profits in the Web3 world. Friend3 are revolutionizing the social monetization landscape by offering customizable pay-per-group communities and introducing a decentralized donation mechanism, enabling passive income for all.t. This partnership demonstrates RACA’s commitment to developing the crypto ecosystem, aiming to leverage all metaverse, web3, dApps, and DeFi sector opportunities. Also Friend3 will soon be listing $RACA as a donation token on the dApp. Also, numerous other initiatives resulting from this partnership with the B2 Network will be announced. Stay tuned. Partnerships to Empower the Blockchain Ecosystem We are constructing an expansive, collaborative, and multichain sector involving Bitcoin, layer 2 solutions, and DeFi, incorporating major decentralized finance protocols within the crypto ecosystem. We have announced crucial partnerships with protocols from diverse ecosystems to establish headquarters for hosting various activities. We believe that the future of the virtual world will be decentralized and multichain, fostering collaboration among all projects, including: OKEX BNBChain KuCoin Wallet Alchemy Pay Altlayer APENFT ApeSwap ARC Finance Ave BabySwap Biswap Bitgert BitKeep Wallet BNBSwap Born To Die game! Bridge Oracle BSCDaily BSCNews Buff Doge […]

Jan

15

Apple Vision Pro can push the metaverse to the mainstream￼

In 2021, the concept of the metaverse caught the world’s attention, driven by Mark Zuckerberg’s rebranding of Facebook to Meta. But with changes in focus between large companies like Meta, Disney and Microsoft, the metaverse seemed to lose its prominence. However, according to a report from our partner OKX, Apple’s launch of Vision Pro, a mixed reality hardware, could rejuvenate interest in the metaverse. This innovative device, announced at the 2023 Worldwide Developers Conference, promises to make the metaverse accessible to the masses. RACA believes in this vision of OKX and also points out that new technologies, such as blockchain, increasingly incorporated into traditional legacy systems, have the potential to transform society as a whole. Large nations such as Brazil, Estonia and China already use blockchain technology in different government identity applications and have also announced investments to expand their interaction with the new digital ecosystem of the metaverse. Along these lines, according to the OKX research team, the impact of Apple Vision Pro on the metaverse could be transformative. Its cutting-edge features and easy-to-use design could expand metaverse adoption. The Vision Pro’s powerful processor could encourage developers to create more complex VR content, enhancing the metaverse experience. However, its […]

Partners

Investment Agency

Tachyon is an accelerator for the world's most ambitious web3 founders. It is a 12-week program that helps founders rapidly validate and grow their businesses. Since 2017, Tachyon has launched 5 programs with 59 active alumni including companies such as CoinShift, Idle, MoNa, OnJuno, Outlet, PieDao, PowerLoom, Secured Finance, Transak, Valist, and many more.

ConsenSys Mesh is an accelerator and incubator of blockchain technology solutions working with the most innovative companies in Web 3.0 and DeFi. Mesh takes essential innovations from the realm of Ethereum software development and fosters its real-life applications. It currently composes a portfolio of over 190 blockchain startups representing more than 249 founders and more than 5,000 individual community members. ConsenSys Mesh was founded by Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin in 2015.

OKC is a secure & programmable smart contracts platform for next-generation decentralized applications, backed by OKX, one of the largest crypto exchanges. The technology built into the chain was designed explicitly for high-performance trading activities and financial services with lower cost, making it an excellent match for many DeFi protocols, NFTs, and other Metaverse applications.

Protocol Labs is an open-source research, development, and deployment laboratory. Its projects include IPFS, Filecoin, libp2p, and many more. The laboratory aims to make human existence orders of magnitude better through technology. Protocol Labs was founded in 2014 by Juan Benet as a fully distributed company. The team of more than 100 members works remotely and in the open to improve the internet — humanity’s most important technology — as we explore new advances in computing and related fields.

DWF Labs is the global digital asset market maker and multi-stage web3 investment firm with offices in Singapore, Switzerland, the British Virgin Islands, the United Arab Emirates, South Korea and Hong Kong. The investment company is an affiliate of Digital Wave Finance (DWF), one of the world's largest high-frequency cryptocurrency trading entities, which trades spot and derivatives markets on over 40 top exchanges.

Tachyon is an accelerator for the world's most ambitious web3 founders. It is a 12-week program that helps founders rapidly validate and grow their businesses. Since 2017, Tachyon has launched 5 programs with 59 active alumni including companies such as CoinShift, Idle, MoNa, OnJuno, Outlet, PieDao, PowerLoom, Secured Finance, Transak, Valist, and many more.

ConsenSys Mesh is an accelerator and incubator of blockchain technology solutions working with the most innovative companies in Web 3.0 and DeFi. Mesh takes essential innovations from the realm of Ethereum software development and fosters its real-life applications. It currently composes a portfolio of over 190 blockchain startups representing more than 249 founders and more than 5,000 individual community members. ConsenSys Mesh was founded by Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin in 2015.

OKC is a secure & programmable smart contracts platform for next-generation decentralized applications, backed by OKX, one of the largest crypto exchanges. The technology built into the chain was designed explicitly for high-performance trading activities and financial services with lower cost, making it an excellent match for many DeFi protocols, NFTs, and other Metaverse applications.

Protocol Labs is an open-source research, development, and deployment laboratory. Its projects include IPFS, Filecoin, libp2p, and many more. The laboratory aims to make human existence orders of magnitude better through technology. Protocol Labs was founded in 2014 by Juan Benet as a fully distributed company. The team of more than 100 members works remotely and in the open to improve the internet — humanity’s most important technology — as we explore new advances in computing and related fields.

DWF Labs is the global digital asset market maker and multi-stage web3 investment firm with offices in Singapore, Switzerland, the British Virgin Islands, the United Arab Emirates, South Korea and Hong Kong. The investment company is an affiliate of Digital Wave Finance (DWF), one of the world's largest high-frequency cryptocurrency trading entities, which trades spot and derivatives markets on over 40 top exchanges.
